title: euphorbia stellata subsp. micracantha
intro: Euphorbia stellata subsp. micracantha, also known as the Spiny Star Cactus, is a species of succulent plant in the Euphorbiaceae family, characterized by its star-shaped spines and ability to store water in its stems. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Euphorbia stellata subsp. micracantha include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in oil, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
